next_steps: Place the patient on airborne and contact isolation precautions immediately
Perform PCR testing for Varicella-zoster virus and Herpes simplex virus from vesicle fluid and the oral ulcer
Perform RPR or VDRL with reflex to confirmatory treponemal test for syphilis
Order HIV screening given the age and presentation of disseminated viral infection
Obtain a detailed history of varicella vaccination and previous zoster or varicella infections
Perform a physical exam focusing on generalized lymphadenopathy and genital mucosa
